offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inconsistent proposal formats cause delays in project approvals. We convert bids into standardized proposals instead of manual proposal creation using word processors.
problem: Inconsistent proposal formats lead to confusion and delays in project approvals.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on proposal workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video

try_it: Let users try template selection for proposals and editable sections
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
